title: Ghee Grilled Rye, A-Style
description: A smoky and crispy Norwegian brunch dish featuring ghee for a raw-friendly twist, served with a side of traditional toppings.

ingredients.name: Fresh herbs (optional, such as dill or parsley)

instructions: Preheat your grill to medium-high heat.
Slice the rye bread into rounds about 1 inch thick.
Rub each slice of bread with a little ghee and sprinkle with salt.
Place the bread slices on the preheated grill for about 2-3 minutes per side, or until golden brown and crispy.
Optional: Add fresh herbs to the top of the bread just before serving as a garnish.
